title: zanthoxylum piperitum var. hispidum
intro: Zanthoxylum piperitum var. hispidum, commonly known as Japanese prickly ash or sanshō, is a type of deciduous shrub native to East Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum piperitum var. hispidum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, Zanthoxylum piperitum var. hispidum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used as a spice in Japanese cuisine.
